n: The Burning Plains of Dor Amarth

steps.t: The Ruins of Díngarth is located near Udûn in Dor Amarth. You should travel to the Ruins of Díngarth.
Gimli and Ingold can be found at the Ruins of Díngarth in Dor Amarth. When you have completed all you wish to do in Udûn you should speak to Gimli and…
